creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
le          2007-02-04 22:14:18 UTC

  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:
    sys/dev/usb          usbdevs ubsa.c 
    share/man/man4       ubsa.4 
  Log:
  Add support for another 3G card and update man page accordingly.
  The patch from the PR was a little outdated w/regards to the
  Vodafone vendor string.
  
  PR:            kern/106033
  Submitted by:  Volker Werth <volker_AT_vwsoft.com>
  MFC in:        3 days
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.8       +14 -2     src/share/man/man4/ubsa.4
  1.21      +2 -0      src/sys/dev/usb/ubsa.c
  1.286     +4 -0      src/sys/dev/usb/usbdevs
